summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pet Health Information feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI components verified working correctly. Pet registration flow includes Health Information step (Step 3 of 7), health data is stored and retrieved correctly, and My Pets page displays health profile data.

features_verified.evidence: Model defined at lines 284-298 with all 12 health fields: vet_name, vet_clinic, vet_phone, medical_conditions, current_medications, dietary_restrictions, spayed_neutered, microchipped, microchip_number, insurance_provider, emergency_contact_name, emergency_contact_phone
Line 316 in models.py: health: Optional[PetHealthInfo] = Field(default=None)
10/10 pytest tests passed - all health fields stored correctly
test_create_pet_public_with_health_info passed - health data stored via public endpoint
test_get_pet_returns_health_data passed - health data returned in GET response
test_my_pets_returns_health_data passed - health data included in pet list
Playwright test confirmed: renderStepHealth function renders at step 1.75, shows 'TestHealthPet123's Health Profile' with all health fields

Screenshot shows: Primary Veterinarian (name, clinic, phone), Medical Conditions, Current Medications, Dietary Restrictions, Spayed/Neutered (Yes/No/Not Sure), Microchipped checkbox, Pet Insurance, Emergency Contact

features_verified.feature: My Pets page Health Vault section
features_verified.evidence: Playwright test found 7 Health Vault sections, expandable to show Vaccinations and Active Medications
MyPets.jsx lines 678-738 implement Health Profile section showing: Primary Vet, Medical Conditions, Medications, Dietary Restrictions, Spayed/Neutered, Microchipped, Insurance, Emergency Contact
Playwright test found all 14 pillars: Celebrate, Dine, Stay, Travel, Care, Enjoy, Fit, Learn, Paperwork, Advisory, Emergency, Farewell, Adopt, Shop

seed_data_creation: Created test pets with health data during pytest execution (auto-cleaned)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet Health Information feature is fully implemented and working. Health step is Step 3 of 7 in pet registration (step value 1.75 in code). All 12 health fields are optional. Health data is displayed in My Pets page under expandable Health Vault section. Pet Soul page correctly shows all 14 pillars.

api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/pets: Returns user's pets with health data
